name: ttmet.co.th
message: The company specializes in the import and export of machinery and spare parts used in the production and quality control for automotive manufacturing. They offer both wholesale and retail sales domestically and internationally, along with installation services, equipment inspections, and maintenance. Their intended clients include automotive manufacturers and businesses in need of machinery and parts. The company is committed to providing comprehensive services to ensure operational efficiency in the automotive sector. Employees: 150 Revenue: $30.4 Million Industry: Automobile Dealers - Retail Phone Number: +66 26255880
